name: decision-council
safety_limits: do not call external APIs or MCPs
do not pretend consensus exists without evidence
do not convert the council into automatic execution
do not mutate Atlas or derived projects during the review
forbidden_actions: treat the chairman synthesis as implementation approval
human_approval_triggers: the council outcome would change global Codex configuration
the decision would activate MCP or external tooling
the decision would mutate a derived project or REYESOFT
the review expands from framing into execution
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill is read-only
validations: the decision states whether council review is actually needed
risks are tied to explicit triggers or local evidence
the next action stays advisory and non-destructive
